title: ForgeBrain Review Result
description: The structured, final-gate decision produced by the Reviewer, combining hard safety gates and scored quality judgment. Produced after the Renderer and Quality Scoring (see reviewer-spec.md) and consumed by Publishing Package preparation, or by the pipeline orchestrator to trigger a revision.

based_on_video_package_id.description: The package_id of the VideoPackage this review evaluated.

based_on_quality_score_id.description: Matches the score_id of the QualityScore this decision weighed.

hard_gate_violations.description: Specific lesson.safety_notes / script.what_to_avoid_saying entries the script actually violated. Non-empty here forces verdict: rejected.

issues.description: Every issue found, whether it drove the verdict or is noted for future attention.

severity.description: blocking issues correspond to hard gate violations; major/minor correspond to quality score shortfalls.

suggested_stage_to_revisit.description: Which pipeline stage's output is the likely place to fix this issue, using the stage names from docs/PIPELINE.md. 'none' for issues noted but not requiring rework.
